original: Obsidian-hued crystals that have palpable effects on people who stay in close contact with them. Primarily used for jewelry, they can also be specially treated to make them gummy and edible, though at the risk of considerably intense fluid growth. Even wearing one as a piercing is likely to augment production and size while worn.
